channel.title: Good Dog Field Notes
channel.description: Fresh takes for first-time dog owners.

item.title: The gear checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified gear purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of behavior
item.description: The most common early stumbles in behavior, and the cheap corrections that fix them for first-time dog owners.

item.title: "leash reactivity tips" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about leash reactivity tips through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your health questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the health questions first-time dog owners keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in gear with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest gear adjustments that first-time dog owners report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: leash reactivity tips
item.description: The persistent myths around leash reactivity tips, stress-tested against what first-time dog owners actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your puppies in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying puppies project for first-time dog owners — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/puppy101 is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the health community this week.

item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified gear purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Starter guide: Behavior without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to behavior for first-time dog owners — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "leash reactivity tips" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "leash reactivity tips" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why first-time dog owners are rethinking Gear
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how first-time dog owners approach gear — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Health on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in health — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Behavior: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping behavior for first-time dog owners.
